name: alchemy-proxmox
description: Alchemy v2 provider for declarative Proxmox VE QEMU VMs and LXC containers.
author: chronokaizen

scripts.deploy:example: npm run build && alchemy deploy examples/alchemy.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.destroy:example: npm run build && alchemy destroy examples/alchemy.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.deploy:example:cachyos: npm run build && alchemy deploy examples/cachyos-iso-vm.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.deploy:example:lxc: npm run build && alchemy deploy examples/lxc.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.deploy:example:vm: npm run build && alchemy deploy examples/vm.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.destroy:example:cachyos: npm run build && alchemy destroy examples/cachyos-iso-vm.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.destroy:example:lxc: npm run build && alchemy destroy examples/lxc.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.destroy:example:vm: npm run build && alchemy destroy examples/vm.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.deploy:ci-host: npm run build && alchemy deploy examples/ci/proxmox-ci-host.run.ts --stage ci --yes
scripts.destroy:ci-host: npm run build && alchemy destroy examples/ci/proxmox-ci-host.run.ts --stage ci --yes
scripts.plan:ci-host: npm run build && alchemy plan examples/ci/proxmox-ci-host.run.ts --stage ci
scripts.plan:example:cachyos: npm run build && alchemy plan examples/cachyos-iso-vm.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.plan:example:lxc: npm run build && alchemy plan examples/lxc.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.plan:example:vm: npm run build && alchemy plan examples/vm.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.plan:example: npm run build && alchemy plan examples/alchemy.run.ts --stage dev
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run test && npm run build
